description.description: Description of the VPN tunnel, providing context or purpose.

ike_version.description: Specifies the IKE protocol version to be used for the VPN tunnel, either 1 or 2.

labels.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the VPN tunnel; must comply with GCP label requirements.

local_traffic_selector.description: Defines the CIDR ranges of traffic to be routed through the VPN tunnel from the local side; must be a valid IPv4 CIDR.

name.description: Defines the unique name of the VPN tunnel, which must be 1-63 characters long and comply with RFC1035.

peer_external_gateway.description: Defines the external gateway used as the peer endpoint for the VPN tunnel, typically an IP address or a gateway resource.

peer_external_gateway_interface.description: Specifies the interface ID of the peer external VPN gateway used for the tunnel. Must match a valid interface on the peer gateway.

peer_gcp_gateway.description: Specifies the URI of the peer VPN gateway, required for establishing the VPN tunnel with another Google Cloud VPN gateway.

peer_ip.description: The public IP address of the peer VPN gateway for the tunnel connection.

remote_traffic_selector.description: Specifies the IP ranges of traffic from the remote VPN gateway that will be routed through the VPN tunnel. Must be in CIDR format.

router.description: Specifies the Google Cloud router associated with the VPN tunnel. Must be in the same region as the tunnel and properly configured for BGP routing.

shared_secret.description: Pre-shared key used for authentication between VPN gateways; must be a string of 8-64 characters.

target_vpn_gateway.description: Specifies the target VPN gateway to associate with the VPN tunnel, must be in the same region as the tunnel.

timeouts.description: Defines the amount of time to wait for the VPN tunnel creation, update, or deletion operations to complete.

vpn_gateway.description: Specifies the VPN gateway used to create the VPN tunnel; must be an existing gateway within the same project and region.

vpn_gateway_interface.description: Specifies the interface ID on the VPN gateway for establishing the tunnel; must be a valid interface number for the gateway.
